news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes Announces ETF Share Splits

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long BULL Daily ETF (BULG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Webull Corporation (BULL) stock, less fees and expenses. BULG was launched on Aug 11, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes Announces ETF Share Splits
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., April 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes, a trusted provider of single stock leveraged ETFs, announce a 1:20 reverse stock split on two of their ETFs. All reverse...
